search_rule.edge_rule: a carrier edge realizes a symbol if its shared active atom set contains an atom with that symbol id
search_rule.global_scope: all open carrier paths starting at any residual carrier with the exact selected-symbol word
search_rule.rooted_scope: all open carrier paths starting at carrier 12 with the exact selected-symbol word
search_rule.target_words: the two abstract x1-tail overhead-2 symbolic completions from the symbol-state obstruction
